body.title: Rename done→awaiting_validation to make CC-verified closure explicit
body.result: cmd_done→awaiting_validation; cmd_close→closed; Igor-side files updated; sprint-ticket skill updated
body.description:
922 done-not-closed tickets make velocity metrics unreliable. Rename the 'done' status to 'awaiting_validation' so Igor cannot mark work complete without CC's signature, making the distinction between Igor-believes-done and CC-verified-closed explicit in the queue schema.

**Affected files:** agent_datacenter/lab/claudecode/cc_queue.py, any Igor-side code that sets status='done', channel/slack message templates that reference 'done'
**Design rules:** status transitions must be documented; no data loss on existing done rows (migrate in place)
**Scope boundary:** in scope: rename 'done' → 'awaiting_validation' in cc_queue schema and all callers; update cc_queue list display. Out of scope: bulk-closing existing done tickets, UI changes, changing what CC does to close tickets (still sets 'closed').
**Test plan:** migration test that existing done rows survive rename; test Igor's cc_queue.py done command now sets awaiting_validation; test CC close path still sets closed.
